recommendations.message: 17437 of 18775 exported symbols lack JSDoc documentation. AI agents can't understand intent without docs.
recommendations.action: Add JSDoc comments to exported functions and types, starting with public API surfaces.

recommendations.message: ~14895K tokens to represent this repo. 1% is boilerplate/noise. AI agents waste context window on noise.
recommendations.action: Add .airspecignore for generated/vendored files. Mark generated files with header comments.

recommendations.message: Decision history is hard to trace. No ADRs or structured decision records found.
recommendations.action: Create a docs/adr/ directory and document key architectural decisions.

recommendations.message: 2086 uses of `any` type found. 24406 parameters lack type annotations. AI agents rely on types to understand data flow.
recommendations.action: Add explicit type annotations to function parameters and return types.

recommendations.message: 6393 cross-module imports use implementation types instead of explicit contracts.
recommendations.action: Create types.ts at module boundaries. Use `import type` for cross-module dependencies.

recommendations.message: Naming conventions are inconsistent across the codebase. AI agents struggle with inconsistent patterns.
recommendations.action: Standardize naming: camelCase for functions/variables, PascalCase for classes/types, kebab-case for files.

recommendations.message: 647 tests use opaque names. AI agents can't learn behavioral contracts from tests.
recommendations.action: Use descriptive names: "should reject expired tokens" instead of "test1".

recommendations.message: 292 circular import edges detected between modules. AI agents can't determine module boundaries.
recommendations.action: Refactor circular dependencies. Use dependency inversion or extract shared types.
